response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:36: Identified song '夢幻' (Mugen) via on-screen text ('作曲: MY FIRST STORY / CHiCO'). Performed by Takane Lui and another VTuber. 2. 04:37-04:59: Transition to post-performance talk. 3. Searched for '夢幻 MY FIRST STORY lyrics' to find the full Japanese lyrics and a translation. 4. Validated lyrics and structured the JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance of the song "Mugen" by VTuber Takane Lui and another performer, followed by a brief post-performance chat.

scenes.description: Takane Lui and another performer sing 'Mugen' on stage in a live concert setting. The song is titled '夢幻' and composed by MY FIRST STORY and CHiCO.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
To you who knows not the meaning of eternity,
It is time to show the answer,
Towards the spiral following the illusion
The reasons that sounded like excuses
Are the fleeting weaknesses that reel in the future
Mistaking that for strength
Hateful, hateful
Ugly, ugly
So black as to hide the moon
Black, black
A murky heart
If only you were not here
Swaying, swaying
Connecting wills like flowers
Taking away, taking away
Tearing hearts like a storm
To you who knows not the meaning of eternity,
It is time to show the answer,
At the end of the spiral following the illusion
Who is waiting?
Swallowing the fate of being born
Remembering the names of countless burdens
Emotions that burn the heart to a crisp
Hateful, hateful
Ugly, ugly
Enough to divide the world
Anger, anger
This burning heart
If only you were not here
Swaying, swaying
Connecting wills like flowers
Taking away, taking away
Tearing hearts like a storm
To you who knows not the meaning of eternity,
It is time to show the answer,
At the end of the spiral following the illusion
Oh, the ending that listened to the demon’s cry
Ending with everything that dwells in this body
A weak person who entrusted the illusion to others
The radiance of life over countless years
In the twilight illuminated by the flicker of prayers
Carrying thousands of nights within
Forcing an answer
Withering, withering
Tearing flowers in the illusionary night
Connecting, connecting
Scattering seeds in the storm
Swaying, swaying
Connecting wills like flowers
Taking away, taking away
Tearing hearts like a storm
To you who knows not the meaning of eternity,
It is time to show the answer,
At the end of the spiral following the illusion
Who awaits?

scenes.description: The song ends, and the performers engage in a brief post-performance chat.
